name: Debra DiGiovanni
bio: Debra DiGiovanni is a Canadian stand-up comedian from Tillsonburg, Ontario, known for rapid-fire, self-deprecating material about dating, body image, and being single. She won the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Female Stand Up three times and was a top-ten finalist on the fifth season of NBC's Last Comic Standing. Her specials include Single Awkward Female, and her album Lady Jazz earned a Juno Award nomination.

timeline.ev: Wins the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-up Newcomer
Reaches the top ten on NBC's Last Comic Standing
Wins a second Canadian Comedy Award for Best Female Stand Up
Special Single Awkward Female premieres on Showtime
Album Lady Jazz earns a Juno Award nomination

accolades: Three-time Canadian Comedy Award winner for Best Female Stand Up
Top-ten finalist on NBC's Last Comic Standing
Juno Award nomination for the album Lady Jazz
